meaning: n.散热器,水箱,冷却器,电暖炉,辐射体
examples: Wade placed his chilled hands on the radiator and warmed them.
You will need to drain the central heating system before you replace the radiator.
My turtle fell behind a radiator and was not discovered until too late.
Cars Land invites guests to cruise low and slow down the main street of Radiator Springs.
Also, Cars Land embraces an important "Cars" cast member that people forget, Radiator Springs itself.
